name: Spring Sandwiches
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the crusts from the loaf of bread and cut into 12 slices, each about 1/8 inch thick.
2. In a small bowl, mash together the chopped anchovies, softened butter, Dijon mustard, finely chopped eggs, dill, parsley, chives, and black pepper until smooth.
3. Spread the mixture evenly on 6 slices of bread.
4. Place another slice of bread on top and lightly press them together.
5. Wrap the sandwiches in wax paper and refrigerate for up to 3 days or freeze (thaw before using).
6. Heat a 10-12 inch skillet over moderate heat, adding butter and oil.
7. When the foam subsides, add the sandwiches in batches and fry for 2 to 3 minutes on each side until crisp and golden brown.
8. Drain on paper towels and serve while hot as a main luncheon course or snack, or cut into quarters to accompany cocktails. Makes 6 sandwiches or 24 hors d'oeuvres.
